name: Azelastine
evidence: H1 antagonist + documented mast cell stabilizer; approved as intranasal/ophthalmic anti-allergic.

name: Olopatadine
evidence: Dual H1 antagonist + mast cell stabilizer; topical ophthalmic/nasal anti-allergic.

name: Nedocromil
evidence: Cromone class; mast cell stabilizer (asthma + allergic conjunctivitis).

name: Pemirolast
evidence: Mast cell stabilizer; ophthalmic anti-allergic.

name: Tranilast
evidence: Anti-allergic + anti-fibrotic mast cell stabilizer; used in atopic dermatitis + keloid scars; cited in MCAS literature.

name: Lodoxamide
evidence: Cromone class; ophthalmic mast cell stabilizer for vernal keratoconjunctivitis.

name: Amlexanox
evidence: Cromone-like anti-allergic; topical for aphthous ulcers + asthma adjunct; IKK-epsilon inhibitor.

name: Levocetirizine
evidence: Active R-enantiomer of cetirizine; H1 antagonist.

name: Bilastine
evidence: Newer-generation H1 antagonist; minimal CNS penetration.

name: Ebastine
evidence: Long-acting H1 antagonist.

name: Mizolastine
evidence: H1 antagonist + LOX inhibition.

name: Doxepin
evidence: Tricyclic with extremely potent H1 + H2 antagonism; used for refractory urticaria.

name: Cinnarizine
evidence: H1 antagonist + Ca channel blocker; antiallergic + antivertigo.

name: Tofacitinib
evidence: JAK1/3 inhibitor; downstream of FcεRI; emerging interest in MCAS-adjacent autoimmunity.

name: Acalabrutinib
evidence: Selective BTK inhibitor; downstream of FcεRI signaling in mast cells.

name: Tacrolimus
evidence: Calcineurin inhibitor; suppresses mast cell mediator release.

name: Pimecrolimus
evidence: Topical calcineurin inhibitor; suppresses mast cell + T cell activation.

name: Hydroxychloroquine
evidence: Anti-malarial + immunomodulator; reported in some MCAS regimens.

name: Glycyrrhizin
evidence: Licorice triterpene saponin; anti-allergic + anti-inflammatory.

name: Hydroxytyrosol
evidence: Olive polyphenol; Nrf2 activator; anti-inflammatory.

name: Cysteamine
evidence: Aminothiol antioxidant; Nrf2-axis modulator; covalent through thiol-disulfide exchange.
